decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to route_webster-ave-sbs (BX41+ SBS). The source mentions 'Bx41 bus service to East 138th Street needs to be restored' in the context of the Webster Avenue SBS planning—the Bx41 service discussed is the route being studied for SBS conversion. No contradictory service_variant in payload. Source 2012_05_webster_cac2_summary appears in the record's source_ids, and alias route_bx41-201205-webster-cac2 is already registered. Closest match is own base_record_id.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Very important to serve public housing at East 138th Street and 3rd Avenue. Bx41 bus service to East 138th Street needs to be restored.
